description: Search files by name pattern (glob). Returns list of matching file paths, one per line. Supports ** (globstar) for recursive matching. Optional preview=N reads first N lines of each file. Cap at 50. Example: {"pattern": "src/**/index.vue", "preview": 5}
name: search_files

pattern.description: Search pattern (glob, e.g. '*.go'). Supports ** for recursive matching.

root.description: Directory to search (defaults to project root)

preview.description: Optional: read first N lines of each file (capped at 50). 0 or omit = no preview
